items.title: Chip stocks enter bear-market territory. A BofA analyst says not to panic.

items.description: The president focused in part on accusing China of “sinister election meddling” in 2020.

items.title: ‘They are relentless’: A scammer is trying to change the email on my empty Robinhood account. What do they have to gain?

items.description: “The hood is bent, the radiator is cracked, and the front bumper is destroyed.”

items.title: How to find the best mortgage rate — it could save you $3,300 a year
items.description: Buyers who skip comparison shopping often end up considerably overpaying for their mortgage.

items.title: A bad health diagnosis will upend your financial plan, but you can set it right again

items.title: Here’s the net worth you need to start getting ahead in your 20s, 30s, 40s and beyond in the U.S.
items.description: About three-fourths of Americans lack the wealth needed to prosper in today’s economy, according to a new benchmark developed by the Aspen Institute.
